_comment: Prompts for Cloudflare Workers AI (Flux) photography. Each entry maps an output file to a prompt. Run scripts/generate-flux-images.mjs (in CI: the 'Generate Flux imagery' workflow). Kept deliberately simple and uncluttered per request.
_style: simple, appetizing food photography, warm natural window light, shallow depth of field, rustic wooden board or parchment background, uncluttered single subject, no text, no watermark

images.prompt: An overhead spread of freshly baked Eritrean and Ethiopian breads on a warm wooden table — a golden cinnamon-raisin himbasha scored in a sunburst, a honey dabo, a cheesy pull-apart dabo, a couple of mini cakes and a bag of coffee beans; inviting but not cluttered
A single round golden himbasha bread scored in a sunburst pattern, studded with raisins and dusted with cinnamon, on parchment
A rustic round honey-glazed dabo bread with a deep amber crust flecked with black seeds, on a wooden board
A large burnished round Ethiopian difo dabo celebration loaf resting on a woven basket
A round red-gold bread brushed with awaze berbere paste, torn to show a soft warm-spiced crumb, on parchment
A glossy golden round bread brushed with spiced clarified butter, on a wooden board
A round golden cheese pull-apart bread with melted cheese in the seams, on parchment
A soft white bread roll split open to show a fresh white cheese filling, on parchment
A round golden garlic bread brushed with herbs and roasted garlic, on a wooden board
A dimpled focaccia-style flatbread topped with black olives and sun-dried tomatoes, drizzled with olive oil
A pale golden soft pull-apart milk bread loaf with a glossy top, on a wooden board
A sliced cinnamon-raisin loaf showing a dark cinnamon swirl and raisins, on parchment
A small stack of thin freckled Ethiopian kita flatbreads on parchment
A small tres leches cake topped with whipped cream and a dusting of cinnamon on a plate
A small chocolate cake topped with whipped cream, caramel drizzle and toffee bits on a plate
A small round banana cake with a golden crumb and a light glaze on a plate
A small plate of deep-brown coffee-cardamom shortbread cookies beside a few roasted coffee beans
A small pile of golden toasted dabo kolo crunch nuggets spilling from a paper bag
A glass cup of amber spiced tea beside cinnamon sticks, cardamom pods and a few cloves, warm light
A clear glass bottle of dark cold brew coffee with ice and a few coffee beans
A kraft paper bag of whole roasted Yirgacheffe coffee beans spilling onto a wooden board
A glass jar of bright red marinara sauce beside fresh basil and a tomato
A small glass jar of golden spiced clarified butter (niter kibbeh) with a few whole spices
A small jar of dark green-black olive tapenade with a spoon and a slice of crusty bread
A small jar of glossy savory spread beside a slice of bread
A linen-lined box of assorted Eritrean and Ethiopian breads and a sweet, ready for delivery
A small linen-lined box holding two breads and a wrapped sweet
An abundant monthly gift box with a large feast loaf, two breads, a sweet and a bag of coffee
A box of assorted mini cakes with cream and caramel toppings
A box holding a tin of loose-leaf tea, a bag of coffee beans and a bottle of cold brew
A box holding a jar of red marinara and two small jars of spreads
Hands flouring dough on a wooden counter in a home kitchen, soft morning light
A cup of spiced tea beside cardamom pods and a small sack of teff flour, warm light
A warm community table with shared bread being passed between hands, candid and inviting
